name: RadiFi Credit Union - Baymeadows Branch
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Baymeadows Branch offers comprehensive banking services including checking, savings, CDs, auto loans, mortgages, and business lending to Jacksonville-area members.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union operates a brick-and-mortar branch in Jacksonville's Southside neighborhood on Old Baymeadows Road, positioned across from Florida State College at Jacksonville. The branch serves as part of a larger credit union network with routing number 263079234 and maintains extended operating hours for both lobby and drive-up services. The Baymeadows location was strategically situated to serve students, commuters, and local residents in a vibrant mixed-use area featuring shopping, dining, and entertainment options.

The branch provides a full range of consumer and business banking products. Deposit services include standard checking and savings accounts, with current promotional offerings including a 13-Month Certificate at 3.75% APY and a High-Yield Checking Account earning up to 4.00% APY. Lending products span auto loans (with 0.25% refinance rate reductions), mortgages ($1,000 cash back on qualifying home loans), and Visa credit cards (1.90% intro APR for 12 months). Operational services include wire transfers, cash transactions, safe deposit boxes, notary services, instant-issue debit cards, and a coin counting machine.

The Baymeadows branch distinguishes itself through personalized member service, evidenced by 229 certified reviews with a 3.8 rating. The team includes specialized roles: mortgage loan originators (Melinda Weber, NMLS #252916; Erika Baker, NMLS #989622), a commercial loan officer, business services specialist, and senior wealth advisor. The branch operates extended hours (lobby Monday-Friday 9 AM-5 PM, Saturday 9 AM-1 PM; drive-up Friday until 6 PM) and maintains a 24-hour ATM for after-hours access. Recent member testimonials highlight professional and patient service from staff members.

The main caveat is that RadiFi is a credit union requiring membership to access services and unlock certain benefits like drive-up withdrawals and member-exclusive money orders. While the promotional offerings are competitive, rates and terms are subject to qualification and time limitations. The branch's physical location near a college campus suggests it may optimize for student and younger member demographics, though it serves the general Jacksonville market.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended drive-up hours until 6 PM on Fridays and competitive rates (3.75% APY on 13-month CDs, 4.00% on high-yield checking)
Specialized lending team including dedicated mortgage originators with NMLS numbers and commercial loan officer on staff
24-hour ATM on-site with free coin counting machine for members
High member satisfaction with 229 certified reviews and 3.8 rating, with specific staff recognition in recent reviews
Strategic location across from Florida State College at Jacksonville appeals to student and commuter demographics
Comprehensive service suite including notary, safe deposit boxes, and instant-issue debit cards
Current promotional incentives: $25 referral bonus, $1,000 cash back on mortgages, 0.25% auto refinance rate reduction
cons: Membership requirement limits accessibility compared to traditional banks; eligibility criteria not detailed on website
Drive-up cash withdrawals capped at $1,000 per transaction for members only
Limited weekend hours (Saturday closes at 1 PM) and no Sunday hours; multiple holiday closures
Promotional rates and offers are time-limited and subject to qualification; actual APY depends on membership tier
Website does not disclose membership fees, minimum account balances, or specific eligibility requirements
best_for: Students and commuters near Florida State College at Jacksonville seeking member-owned credit union benefits
Jacksonville Southside residents and small business owners needing personalized commercial and business lending services
Homebuyers and refinancers in the Jacksonville area looking for mortgage origination with promotional cash incentives
Members seeking high-yield savings accounts and competitive CD rates with extended drive-up banking hours
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union's Baymeadows Branch is best for Jacksonville-area residents and students seeking member-owned credit union banking with competitive savings and lending rates, personalized service, and extended drive-up hours. The primary caveat is membership requirement and the need to qualify for specific promotional rates; prospective members should verify eligibility and review fee structures before opening accounts.
services: Certificate of Deposit products (promotional 13-month at 3.75% APY)
Auto loans and auto loan refinancing (0.25% rate reduction promotion)
Home mortgages with $1,000 cash back incentive
Visa credit cards (1.90% intro APR for 12 months)
Drive-up cash withdrawals (up to $1,000, members only)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
